name: Stuffed Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut zucchini lengthwise in half.
2. Scoop out pulp, leaving a 1/4-inch wall; chop the pulp and reserve it.
3. Place zucchini shells cut sides down in a dish.
4. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) until crisp tender, about 5 to 6 minutes.
5. In a 1.5-quart casserole or bowl, combine reserved pulp, onions, butter, and cover; microwave on high (100%) until tender, 6 to 7 minutes.
6. Stir in bread cubes, cheese, tomato, salt, and pepper.
7. Turn zucchini shells cut sides up; spoon the mixture into shells.
8. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) until hot, 2 to 3 minutes.
